movies.title: Backrooms
movies.synopsis: Found-footage horror in the endless yellow halls. VOSTFR release with selectable EN/FR subtitles.

movies.title: The Amazing Digital Circus: The Last Act
movies.cast: Lizzie Freeman, Michael Kovach, Amanda Hufford
movies.synopsis: Feature-length version of the final two episodes (8 and 9) of The Amazing Digital Circus - the conclusion of the cast trapped in a digital realm under an unstable ringmaster.

movies.title: Felix the Cat: The Movie
movies.cast: David Kolin, Chris Phillips, Maureen O'Connell, Peter Newman, Alice Playten, Don Oriolo
movies.synopsis: In another dimension, the villainous scientist Duke of Zill, with the help of his mechanical, geometric army, takes over the Land of Oriana, prompting Felix the Cat to save its princess and restore order once again.

movies.title: A Goofy Movie
movies.cast: Bill Farmer, Jason Marsden, Jim Cummings, Kellie Martin, Rob Paulsen, Wallace Shawn
movies.synopsis: Goofy and his teenage son Max hit the open road on a cross-country trip - fishing, Bigfoot, and Powerline concert chaos included. It's hard to be cool when your dad is Goofy.

movies.title: Michael
movies.cast: Jaafar Jackson, Colman Domingo, Nia Long, Miles Teller, Kendrick Sampson, Juliano Krue Valdi, KeiLyn Durrel Jones
movies.synopsis: Biographical drama following Michael Jackson from his Jackson 5 days in the 1960s through the Bad World Tour in the late 1980s - his life off-stage and some of the most iconic performances of his early solo career.
